plugins.name: Dictionary
plugins.author: lia
plugins.description: Look up words in online dictionaries. Supports definitions, synonyms, antonyms, and rhymes with configurable URL templates.

plugins.name: Keyboard Backlight

plugins.name: Package Tracking
plugins.author: lia
plugins.description: Track shipping packages via DHL, FedEx, UPS, and USPS. View delivery status and checkpoint history from the bar.
